headline: Iran War Sends Oil To $90, Jobs Shock Compounds Fears: This Week On Wall Street
summary: Oil prices near $90 as the Hormuz crisis disrupts supply, sending airline and cruise stocks like DAL, RCL and CCL sharply lower amid weak jobs data.

headline: RCL Adds New Ships and Destinations: Driving Long-Term Growth?

headline: Starboard Group Appoints Jia Jia Liu as General Manager, Asia Market
summary: MIAMI, March 06, 2026--Starboard Group, the world’s leading retail curator at sea, today announced the promotion of Jia Jia Liu to General Manager, Asia Market.

headline: NACCO Industries Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: NACCO Industries (NYSE:NC) executives said the company finished 2025 with improved operating momentum across its three reportable segments, while a pension plan termination charge and a tax expense adjustment pushed reported fourth-quarter results into a loss. Management opens with safety incident

headline: Why Are Carnival Shares Falling Friday?
summary: Carnival Corp (NYSE: CCL) drops 2.36% in Friday premarket trading as WTI crude nears $85 and Middle East conflict disrupts the Strait of Hormuz, pressuring cruise stocks.
